top_signals.title: US Stocks Erase Losses as Investors Bet Peace Deal is Near
top_signals.summary: US stocks shuffled between gains and losses on Wednesday, as investors remained optimistic that an end to the war in the Middle East was near, even as President Donald Trump panned earlier reports of a deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
